    <!DOCTYPE html>
    <html lang="fr" data-theme="light">
    <head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8"/>
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0"/>
    <title>KinéApp — Espace Professionnel</title>
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.5.0/css/all.min.css"/>
    <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@supabase/supabase-js@2"></script>
    <style>
    :root{
    --bg:#f0f4f8;--card:#fff;--sidebar:#1e293b;--sidebar-text:#94a3b8;--sidebar-active:#3b82f6;
    --text:#1a202c;--text2:#4a5568;--text3:#718096;--border:#e2e8f0;
    --accent:#3b82f6;--accent2:#1d4ed8;--green:#10b981;--red:#ef4444;--orange:#f59e0b;--purple:#8b5cf6;
    --shadow:0 2px 12px rgba(0,0,0,.07);--shadow2:0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,.12);
    --radius:14px;--radius-sm:9px;
    }
    [data-theme="dark"]{
    --bg:#0f172a;--card:#1e293b;--sidebar:#0f172a;--text:#f1f5f9;--text2:#cbd5e1;--text3:#64748b;
    --border:#334155;--shadow:0 2px 12px rgba(0,0,0,.3);--shadow2:0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,.4);
    }
    *{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0;-webkit-tap-highlight-color:transparent}
    body{font-family:'Segoe UI',system-ui,sans-serif;background:var(--bg);color:var(--text);min-height:100vh;overflow-x:hidden}
    #loginScreen{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;min-height:100vh;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#0f172a 0%,#1e3a8a 50%,#0f172a 100%);padding:20px}
    .login-card{background:rgba(255,255,255,.05);backdrop-filter:blur(20px);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1);border-radius:24px;padding:40px 36px;width:100%;max-width:420px;box-shadow:0 32px 64px rgba(0,0,0,.4)}
    .login-logo{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:12px;margin-bottom:32px}
    .login-logo-icon{width:52px;height:52px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#3b82f6,#8b5cf6);border-radius:16px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:24px;color:#fff}
    .login-logo-text{font-size:26px;font-weight:800;color:#fff}
    .login-logo-sub{font-size:12px;color:#94a3b8;font-weight:500}
    .login-title{font-size:20px;font-weight:700;color:#fff;text-align:center;margin-bottom:6px}
    .login-sub{font-size:13px;color:#94a3b8;text-align:center;margin-bottom:28px}
    .login-field{margin-bottom:16px}
    .login-label{font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:#94a3b8;margin-bottom:6px;display:block;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.5px}
    .login-input{width:100%;background:rgba(255,255,255,.07);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.15);border-radius:10px;padding:12px 14px;color:#fff;font-size:14px;outline:none;transition:border-color .2s}
    .login-input:focus{border-color:#3b82f6}
    .login-input::placeholder{color:#475569}
    .login-btn{width:100%;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#3b82f6,#6366f1);color:#fff;border:none;border-radius:10px;padding:13px;font-size:15px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;margin-top:8px;transition:opacity .2s}
    .login-btn:hover{opacity:.9}
    .login-btn:disabled{opacity:.5;cursor:not-allowed}
    .login-hint{text-align:center;font-size:12px;color:#475569;margin-top:16px}
    .login-error{background:rgba(239,68,68,.1);border:1px solid rgba(239,68,68,.3);color:#fca5a5;border-radius:8px;padding:9px 12px;font-size:12px;margin-bottom:14px;display:none}
    #appScreen{display:none;min-height:100vh}
    .app-layout{display:flex;min-height:100vh}
    .sidebar{width:240px;background:var(--sidebar);display:flex;flex-direction:column;position:fixed;top:0;left:0;bottom:0;z-index:50;transition:transform .3s}
    .sidebar-logo{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:20px 18px 16px;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.06)}
    .sidebar-logo-icon{width:36px;height:36px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#3b82f6,#8b5cf6);border-radius:10px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#fff;font-size:16px;flex-shrink:0}
    .sidebar-logo-text{font-size:15px;font-weight:700;color:#fff}
    .sidebar-logo-sub{font-size:10px;color:#64748b}
    .sidebar-user{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:14px 18px;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.06);margin-bottom:8px}
    .sidebar-avatar{width:36px;height:36px;border-radius:50%;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#10b981,#3b82f6);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#fff;font-weight:700;font-size:14px;flex-shrink:0}
    .sidebar-user-info{flex:1;min-width:0}
    .sidebar-user-name{font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:#e2e8f0;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis}
    .sidebar-user-role{font-size:11px;color:#64748b}
    .sidebar-nav{flex:1;padding:0 10px;overflow-y:auto}
    .nav-section{font-size:10px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.8px;color:#475569;padding:14px 8px 6px}
    .nav-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:9px 10px;border-radius:9px;color:var(--sidebar-text);cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s;margin-bottom:2px;font-size:13px;font-weight:500;user-select:none}
    .nav-item:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.06);color:#e2e8f0}
    .nav-item.active{background:rgba(59,130,246,.2);color:#60a5fa}
    .nav-item i{width:18px;text-align:center;font-size:14px;flex-shrink:0}
    .nav-badge{margin-left:auto;background:#ef4444;color:#fff;border-radius:10px;padding:1px 7px;font-size:10px;font-weight:700}
    .sidebar-bottom{padding:12px 10px;border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.06)}
    .live-dot{display:inline-block;width:7px;height:7px;background:#10b981;border-radius:50%;margin-right:5px;animation:pulse 2s infinite}
    @keyframes pulse{0%,100%{opacity:1}50%{opacity:.4}}
    .main{margin-left:240px;flex:1;display:flex;flex-direction:column;min-height:100vh}
    .topbar{background:var(--card);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);padding:0 24px;height:60px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;position:sticky;top:0;z-index:40;box-shadow:var(--shadow)}
    .topbar-left{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px}
    .topbar-title{font-size:18px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text)}
    .topbar-sub{font-size:12px;color:var(--text3);margin-top:1px}
    .topbar-right{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px}
    .tb-btn{background:var(--bg);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text2);width:36px;height:36px;border-radius:9px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;cursor:pointer;font-size:14px;transition:all .2s}
    .tb-btn:hover{background:var(--accent);color:#fff;border-color:var(--accent)}
    .page-content{padding:24px;flex:1}
    .view{display:none}
    .view.active{display:block}
    .stats-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:16px;margin-bottom:24px}
    .stat-card{background:var(--card);border-radius:var(--radius);padding:20px;border:1px solid var(--border);box-shadow:var(--shadow);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:16px}
    .stat-icon{width:48px;height:48px;border-radius:12px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:20px;flex-shrink:0}
    .stat-icon.blue{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#dbeafe,#bfdbfe);color:#1d4ed8}
    .stat-icon.green{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#d1fae5,#a7f3d0);color:#065f46}
    .stat-icon.orange{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#fed7aa,#fdba74);color:#92400e}
    .stat-icon.purple{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#ede9fe,#ddd6fe);color:#5b21b6}
    [data-theme="dark"] .stat-icon.blue{background:rgba(59,130,246,.2);color:#60a5fa}
    [data-theme="dark"] .stat-icon.green{background:rgba(16,185,129,.2);color:#34d399}
    [data-theme="dark"] .stat-icon.orange{background:rgba(245,158,11,.2);color:#fbbf24}
    [data-theme="dark"] .stat-icon.purple{background:rgba(139,92,246,.2);color:#a78bfa}
    .stat-value{font-size:28px;font-weight:800;color:var(--text);line-height:1}
    .stat-label{font-size:12px;color:var(--text3);margin-top:4px}
    .stat-trend{font-size:11px;font-weight:600;margin-top:4px}
    .stat-trend.up{color:var(--green)}
    .stat-trend.warn{color:var(--orange)}
    .section-hdr{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:16px}
    .section-title{font-size:16px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px}
    .section-title i{color:var(--accent);font-size:15px}
    .btn{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;padding:9px 16px;border-radius:var(--radius-sm);font-size:13px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s;border:none}
    .btn-primary{background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--accent),#6366f1);color:#fff}
    .btn-primary:hover{opacity:.9}
    .btn-primary:disabled{opacity:.5;cursor:not-allowed}
    .btn-secondary{background:var(--bg);border:1.5px solid var(--border);color:var(--text2)}
    .btn-secondary:hover{border-color:var(--accent);color:var(--accent)}
    .btn-danger{background:#fef2f2;border:1.5px solid #fca5a5;color:#dc2626}
    .btn-danger:hover{background:#dc2626;color:#fff}
    .btn-sm{padding:6px 12px;font-size:12px}
    .btn-icon-only{width:32px;height:32px;padding:0;justify-content:center}
    .table-wrap{background:var(--card);border-radius:var(--radius);border:1px solid var(--border);box-shadow:var(--shadow);overflow:hidden}
    .table-header{padding:14px 18px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:12px;flex-wrap:wrap}
    .search-wrap{position:relative;flex:1;max-width:300px}
    .search-wrap i{position:absolute;left:10px;top:50%;transform:translateY(-50%);color:var(--text3);font-size:13px}
    .search-input{width:100%;background:var(--bg);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--radius-sm);padding:8px 12px 8px 32px;font-size:13px;color:var(--text);outline:none}
    .search-input:focus{border-color:var(--accent)}
    table{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse}
    th{padding:11px 16px;text-align:left;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.5px;color:var(--text3);background:var(--bg);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)}
    td{padding:13px 16px;font-size:13px;color:var(--text2);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);vertical-align:middle}
    tr:last-child td{border-bottom:none}
    tr:hover td{background:var(--bg)}
    .patient-cell{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px}
    .patient-avatar{width:34px;height:34px;border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-weight:700;font-size:13px;color:#fff;flex-shrink:0}
    .patient-name{font-weight:600;color:var(--text);font-size:13px}
    .patient-patho{font-size:11px;color:var(--text3);margin-top:1px}
    .badge{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;padding:3px 9px;border-radius:20px;font-size:11px;font-weight:700}
    .badge-green{background:#d1fae5;color:#065f46}
    .badge-red{background:#fee2e2;color:#991b1b}
    .badge-orange{background:#fef3c7;color:#92400e}
    .badge-blue{background:#dbeafe;color:#1e40af}
    .badge-gray{background:var(--bg);color:var(--text3);border:1px solid var(--border)}
    [data-theme="dark"] .badge-green{background:rgba(16,185,129,.2);color:#34d399}
    [data-theme="dark"] .badge-red{background:rgba(239,68,68,.2);color:#fca5a5}
    [data-theme="dark"] .badge-orange{background:rgba(245,158,11,.2);color:#fbbf24}
    [data-theme="dark"] .badge-blue{background:rgba(59,130,246,.2);color:#93c5fd}
    .cards-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(280px,1fr));gap:16px}
    .prog-card{background:var(--card);border-radius:var(--radius);border:1px solid var(--border);box-shadow:var(--shadow);overflow:hidden;transition:box-shadow .2s}
    .prog-card:hover{box-shadow:var(--shadow2)}
    .prog-card-header{padding:16px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;align-items:flex-start;justify-content:space-between;gap:8px}
    .prog-card-icon{width:40px;height:40px;border-radius:10px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:18px;flex-shrink:0}
    .prog-card-body{padding:14px 16px}
    .prog-card-footer{padding:12px 16px;border-top:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between}
    .prog-title{font-size:14px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text);line-height:1.3}
    .prog-sub{font-size:12px;color:var(--text3);margin-top:3px}
    .modal-overlay{display:none;position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,.5);z-index:200;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:16px;backdrop-filter:blur(4px)}
    .modal-overlay.open{display:flex}
    .modal{background:var(--card);border-radius:20px;width:100%;max-width:600px;max-height:90vh;overflow:hidden;display:flex;flex-direction:column;box-shadow:var(--shadow2)}
    .modal-lg{max-width:820px}
    .modal-hdr{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:18px 22px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);flex-shrink:0}
    .modal-hdr-title{font-size:16px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:9px}
    .modal-close{background:var(--bg);border:1px solid var(--border);width:32px;height:32px;border-radius:8px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;cursor:pointer;color:var(--text3);font-size:14px;transition:all .2s;flex-shrink:0}
    .modal-close:hover{background:var(--red);color:#fff;border-color:var(--red)}
    .modal-body{padding:22px;overflow-y:auto;flex:1}
    .modal-footer{padding:16px 22px;border-top:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;gap:10px;justify-content:flex-end;flex-shrink:0}
    .form-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:16px}
    .form-group{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:6px}
    .form-group.full{grid-column:1/-1}
    .form-label{font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text2);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.4px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px}
    .form-label span{color:var(--red)}
    .form-input,.form-select,.form-textarea{background:var(--bg);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--radius-sm);padding:10px 12px;font-size:13px;color:var(--text);outline:none;transition:border-color .2s;font-family:inherit;width:100%}
    .form-input:focus,.form-select:focus,.form-textarea:focus{border-color:var(--accent)}
    .form-textarea{min-height:80px;resize:vertical}
    .ex-builder{border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--radius);overflow:hidden;margin-top:8px}
    .ex-builder-hdr{background:var(--bg);padding:12px 16px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)}
    .ex-builder-hdr-title{font-size:13px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:7px}
    .ex-item{background:var(--card);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)}
    .ex-item:last-child{border-bottom:none}
    .ex-item-hdr{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:12px 14px;cursor:pointer}
    .ex-drag{color:var(--text3);font-size:14px;flex-shrink:0}
    .ex-num{width:24px;height:24px;border-radius:7px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--accent),var(--purple));color:#fff;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0}
    .ex-item-name{flex:1;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text)}
    .ex-item-quick{font-size:11px;color:var(--text3);margin-top:1px}
    .ex-item-body{display:none;padding:14px;border-top:1px solid var(--border);background:var(--bg)}
    .ex-item.open .ex-item-body{display:block}
    .ex-item.open .ex-chevron{transform:rotate(180deg)}
    .ex-chevron{color:var(--text3);font-size:12px;transition:transform .3s}
    .dosage-row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:8px;margin-bottom:12px}
    .dosage-mini{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:4px}
    .dosage-mini label{font-size:10px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.4px;color:var(--text3)}
    .detail-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:300px 1fr;gap:20px}
    .detail-sidebar{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:16px}
    .patient-profile-card{background:var(--card);border-radius:var(--radius);border:1px solid var(--border);padding:20px;text-align:center;box-shadow:var(--shadow)}
    .profile-avatar{width:72px;height:72px;border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:28px;font-weight:700;color:#fff;margin:0 auto 12px}
    .profile-name{font-size:18px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text)}
    .profile-patho{font-size:13px;color:var(--text3);margin-top:3px}
    .profile-meta{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;justify-content:center;gap:6px;margin-top:12px}
    .info-card{background:var(--card);border-radius:var(--radius);border:1px solid var(--border);padding:16px;box-shadow:var(--shadow)}
    .info-card-title{font-size:12px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.5px;color:var(--text3);margin-bottom:12px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px}
    .info-row{display:flex;align-items:flex-start;justify-content:space-between;gap:8px;padding:7px 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);font-size:13px}
    .info-row:last-child{border-bottom:none;padding-bottom:0}
    .info-row-label{color:var(--text3);flex-shrink:0}
    .info-row-val{color:var(--text);font-weight:500;text-align:right}
    .share-box{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#eff6ff,#dbeafe);border:1.5px solid #93c5fd;border-radius:var(--radius-sm);padding:14px;margin-top:12px}
    [data-theme="dark"] .share-box{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#1e3a5f,#1e3a8a22);border-color:#3b82f6}
    .share-link-row{display:flex;gap:8px;align-items:center;margin-top:8px}
    .share-link{flex:1;background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:9px 12px;font-size:11px;color:var(--text2);font-family:monospace;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap}
    .tabs{display:flex;gap:4px;background:var(--bg);border-radius:10px;padding:4px;margin-bottom:20px;border:1px solid var(--border)}
    .tab{flex:1;padding:8px 12px;border-radius:8px;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;text-align:center;cursor:pointer;color:var(--text3);transition:all .2s;user-select:none}
    .tab.active{background:var(--card);color:var(--accent);box-shadow:var(--shadow)}
    .alert{display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:10px;padding:12px 14px;border-radius:var(--radius-sm);margin-bottom:16px;font-size:13px}
    .alert-warn{background:#fffbeb;border:1px solid #fcd34d;color:#92400e}
    [data-theme="dark"] .alert-warn{background:rgba(245,158,11,.1);border-color:#92400e;color:#fbbf24}
    .alert i{flex-shrink:0;margin-top:1px}
    .lib-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(240px,1fr));gap:12px}
    .lib-card{background:var(--card);border-radius:var(--radius-sm);border:1px solid var(--border);padding:14px;cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s;box-shadow:var(--shadow)}
    .lib-card:hover{border-color:var(--accent);box-shadow:var(--shadow2)}
    .lib-card-name{font-size:13px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text);margin-bottom:4px}
    .lib-card-meta{font-size:11px;color:var(--text3);display:flex;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap}
    .rgpd-notice{background:var(--bg);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--radius-sm);padding:10px 14px;display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:8px;font-size:11px;color:var(--text3);margin-top:12px}
    .rgpd-notice i{flex-shrink:0;margin-top:1px;color:var(--accent)}
    .new-badge{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;background:#ef4444;color:#fff;font-size:9px;font-weight:700;padding:2px 6px;border-radius:10px;animation:pulse 1.5s infinite;margin-left:6px}
    .loading-spinner{display:inline-block;width:14px;height:14px;border:2px solid rgba(255,255,255,.3);border-top-color:#fff;border-radius:50%;animation:spin .7s linear infinite}
    @keyframes spin{to{transform:rotate(360deg)}}
    .full-loader{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:60px;color:var(--text3);font-size:13px;gap:10px}
    @media(max-width:900px){.stats-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr}.detail-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}.form-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}}
    @media(max-width:640px){.sidebar{transform:translateX(-100%)}.sidebar.open{transform:translateX(0)}.main{margin-left:0}.stats-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr}.page-content{padding:16px}}
    ::-webkit-scrollbar{width:5px;height:5px}
    ::-webkit-scrollbar-track{background:transparent}
    ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:var(--border);border-radius:4px}
    .fade-in{animation:fadeIn .25s ease}
    @keyframes fadeIn{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(8px)}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}}
    .toast{position:fixed;bottom:24px;right:24px;background:#1e293b;color:#fff;border-radius:10px;padding:12px 18px;font-size:13px;font-weight:500;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;z-index:999;box-shadow:var(--shadow2);animation:slideUp .3s ease}
    @keyframes slideUp{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(16px)}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}}
    </style>
    </head>
    <body>
    <!-- ===== LOGIN ===== -->
    <div id="loginScreen">
    <div class="login-card">
    <div class="login-logo">
    <div class="login-logo-icon"><i class="fa-solid fa-person-running"></i></div>
    <div><div class="login-logo-text">KinéApp</div><div class="login-logo-sub">Professional Platform</div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="login-title">Connexion Professionnelle</div>
    <div class="login-sub">Accédez à votre espace kiné sécurisé</div>
    <div class="login-error" id="loginError"></div>
    <div class="login-field">
    <label class="login-label">Email</label>
    <input class="login-input" type="email" id="loginEmail" placeholder="kine@cabinet.fr"/>
    </div>
    <div class="login-field">
    <label class="login-label">Mot de passe</label>
    <input class="login-input" type="password" id="loginPwd" placeholder="••••••••"/>
    </div>
    <button class="login-btn" onclick="doLogin()" id="loginBtnEl">Se connecter</button>
    <div class="login-hint">Première connexion ? Entrez votre email et un mot de passe (8+ caractères) — votre profil sera créé automatiquement.</div>
    <div style="text-align:center;font-size:11px;color:#64748b;margin-top:12px">
    <a href="/legal.html" style="color:#94a3b8">Mentions légales</a> ·
    <a href="/privacy.html" style="color:#94a3b8">Confidentialité</a> ·
    <a href="/cgu.html" style="color:#94a3b8">CGU</a>
    </div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <!-- ===== APP ===== -->
    <div id="appScreen">
    <div class="app-layout">
    <aside class="sidebar" id="sidebar">
    <div class="sidebar-logo">
    <div class="sidebar-logo-icon"><i class="fa-solid fa-person-running"></i></div>
    <div><div class="sidebar-logo-text">KinéApp</div><div class="sidebar-logo-sub"><span class="live-dot"></span>Connecté</div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="sidebar-user">
    <div class="sidebar-avatar" id="sidebarInitials">K</div>
    <div class="sidebar-user-info"><div class="sidebar-user-name" id="sidebarName">—</div><div class="sidebar-user-role">Kinésithérapeute</div></div>
    </div>
    <nav class="sidebar-nav">
    <div class="nav-section">PRINCIPAL</div>
    <div class="nav-item active" onclick="showView('dashboard')" id="nav-dashboard"><i class="fa-solid fa-gauge"></i><span>Tableau de bord</span></div>
    <div class="nav-item" onclick="showView('patients')" id="nav-patients"><i class="fa-solid fa-users"></i><span>Patients</span><span class="nav-badge" id="patientsBadge">0</span></div>
    <div class="nav-item" onclick="showView('programs')" id="nav-programs"><i class="fa-solid fa-clipboard-list"></i><span>Programmes</span></div>
    <div class="nav-section">OUTILS</div>
    <div class="nav-item" onclick="window.location.href='/dashboard'" id="nav-dashboard-suivi"><i class="fa-solid fa-chart-line"></i><span>Dashboard de suivi</span></div>
    <div class="nav-item" onclick="showView('library')" id="nav-library"><i class="fa-solid fa-book-medical"></i><span>Bibliothèque</span></div>
    <div class="nav-item" onclick="showView('settings')" id="nav-settings"><i class="fa-solid fa-gear"></i><span>Paramètres</span></div>
    </nav>
    <div class="sidebar-bottom"><div class="nav-item" onclick="doLogout()"><i class="fa-solid fa-right-from-bracket"></i><span>Déconnexion</span></div></div>
    </aside>
    <main class="main">
    <div class="topbar">
    <div class="topbar-left"><div><div class="topbar-title" id="topbarTitle">Tableau de bord</div><div class="topbar-sub" id="topbarSub">Données en temps réel</div></div></div>
    <div class="topbar-right">
    <button class="tb-btn" onclick="toggleTheme()" id="themeBtn"><i class="fa-solid fa-moon"></i></button>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="page-content">
    <!-- DASHBOARD -->
    <div class="view active fade-in" id="view-dashboard">
    <div class="stats-grid">
    <div class="stat-card"><div class="stat-icon blue"><i class="fa-solid fa-users"></i></div><div><div class="stat-value" id="statPatients">0</div><div class="stat-label">Patients actifs</div></div></div>
    <div class="stat-card"><div class="stat-icon green"><i class="fa-solid fa-clipboard-check"></i></div><div><div class="stat-value" id="statProgs">0</div><div class="stat-label">Programmes actifs</div></div></div>
    <div class="stat-card"><div class="stat-icon orange"><i class="fa-solid fa-triangle-exclamation"></i></div><div><div class="stat-value" id="statInactive">0</div><div class="stat-label">Patients inactifs</div></div></div>
    <div class="stat-card"><div class="stat-icon purple"><i class="fa-solid fa-dumbbell"></i></div><div><div class="stat-value" id="statExos">0</div><div class="stat-label">Exercices en biblio</div></div></div>
    </div>
    <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:20px">
    <div class="table-wrap">
    <div class="table-header"><div class="section-title"><i class="fa-solid fa-clock-rotate-left"></i>Activité récente <span class="live-dot"></span></div></div>
    <table><thead><tr><th>Patient</th><th>Action</th><th>Quand</th></tr></thead><tbody id="activityBody"><tr><td colspan="3" style="text-align:center;padding:24px;color:var(--text3)">Aucune activité récente</td></tr></tbody></table>
    </div>
    <div class="table-wrap">
    <div class="table-header"><div class="section-title"><i class="fa-solid fa-bell"></i>Alertes</div></div>
    <div style="padding:16px" id="alertsContainer"><div class="alert alert-warn"><i class="fa-solid fa-circle-info"></i><div>Aucune alerte active.</div></div></div>
    </div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <!-- PATIENTS -->
    <div class="view fade-in" id="view-patients">
    <div class="table-wrap">
    <div class="table-header">
    <div class="search-wrap"><i class="fa-solid fa-magnifying-glass"></i><input class="search-input" id="patientSearch" placeholder="Rechercher un patient..." oninput="filterPatients()"/></div>
    <button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="openNewPatient()"><i class="fa-solid fa-plus"></i>Nouveau patient</button>
    </div>
    <table><thead><tr><th>Patient</th><th>Âge</th><th>Programme</th><th>Statut</th><th>Dernière activité</th><th>Actions</th></tr></thead>
    <tbody id="patientsBody"><tr><td colspan="6" class="full-loader"><span class="loading-spinner" style="border-top-color:var(--accent);border-color:var(--border)"></span>Chargement...</td></tr></tbody></table>
    </div>
    </div>
    <!-- PATIENT DETAIL -->
    <div class="view fade-in" id="view-patient-detail">
    <div style="margin-bottom:16px"><button class="btn btn-secondary btn-sm" onclick="showView('patients')"><i class="fa-solid fa-arrow-left"></i>Retour</button></div>
    <div class="detail-grid">
    <div class="detail-sidebar">
    <div class="patient-profile-card">
    <div class="profile-avatar" id="detailAvatar">K</div>
    <div class="profile-name" id="detailName">—</div>
    <div class="profile-patho" id="detailPatho">—</div>
    <div class="profile-meta" id="detailMeta"></div>
    <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;justify-content:center;margin-top:14px;flex-wrap:wrap">
    <button class="btn btn-primary btn-sm" onclick="editCurrentPatient()"><i class="fa-solid fa-pen"></i>Modifier</button>
    <button class="btn btn-danger btn-sm" onclick="deleteCurrentPatient()"><i class="fa-solid fa-trash"></i>Supprimer</button>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="info-card"><div class="info-card-title"><i class="fa-solid fa-circle-info"></i>Informations</div><div id="detailInfoRows"></div></div>
    <div class="info-card"><div class="info-card-title"><i class="fa-solid fa-share-nodes"></i>Partage</div><div id="shareBox"></div></div>
    <div class="info-card">
    <div class="info-card-title"><i class="fa-solid fa-lock"></i>Notes cliniques privées</div>
    <textarea class="form-textarea" id="privateNotes" style="font-size:13px" placeholder="Notes visibles uniquement par vous..." onblur="saveNotes()"></textarea>
    <div class="rgpd-notice"><i class="fa-solid fa-shield-halved"></i>Non accessibles au patient (RGPD)</div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div>
    <div class="tabs">
    <div class="tab active" onclick="switchTab(0,this)">Programme</div>
    <div class="tab" onclick="switchTab(1,this)">Suivi <span class="live-dot"></span></div>
    <div class="tab" onclick="switchTab(2,this)">Messages</div>
    </div>
    <div id="tabContent0">
    <div class="section-hdr"><div class="section-title"><i class="fa-solid fa-clipboard-list"></i>Programme actif</div><button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="openProgramBuilder()"><i class="fa-solid fa-plus"></i>Créer programme</button></div>
    <div id="patientProgramContainer"><div style="text-align:center;padding:32px;color:var(--text3)">Aucun programme assigné.</div></div>
    </div>
    <div id="tabContent1" style="display:none">
    <div class="section-title" style="margin-bottom:16px"><i class="fa-solid fa-chart-line"></i>Suivi & Ressentis (temps réel)</div>
    <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:12px;margin-bottom:20px">
    <div class="stat-card"><div class="stat-icon green"><i class="fa-solid fa-heart-pulse"></i></div><div><div class="stat-value" id="avgEVA">—</div><div class="stat-label">EVA moy.</div></div></div>
    <div class="stat-card"><div class="stat-icon orange"><i class="fa-solid fa-fire"></i></div><div><div class="stat-value" id="avgBorg">—</div><div class="stat-label">Borg moy.</div></div></div>
    <div class="stat-card"><div class="stat-icon blue"><i class="fa-solid fa-calendar-check"></i></div><div><div class="stat-value" id="nbSessions">0</div><div class="stat-label">Séances</div></div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="table-wrap"><div class="table-header"><div class="section-title"><i class="fa-solid fa-list"></i>Historique séances</div></div>
    <table><thead><tr><th>Date</th><th>EVA</th><th>Borg</th><th>Symptômes</th><th>Note patient</th></tr></thead>
    <tbody id="sessionHistoryBody"><tr><td colspan="5" style="text-align:center;padding:24px;color:var(--text3)">Aucune séance enregistrée</td></tr></tbody></table>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div id="tabContent2" style="display:none">
    <div class="section-title" style="margin-bottom:16px"><i class="fa-solid fa-comment-medical"></i>Messagerie</div>
    <div id="messagesContainer" style="max-height:350px;overflow-y:auto;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px;margin-bottom:12px;padding:4px"></div>
    <div style="display:flex;gap:8px">
    <input class="form-input" id="newMessage" placeholder="Écrire un message au patient..." style="flex:1" onkeydown="if(event.key==='Enter')sendMessage()"/>
    <button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="sendMessage()"><i class="fa-solid fa-paper-plane"></i></button>
    </div>
    </div>
    </div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <!-- PROGRAMS -->
    <div class="view fade-in" id="view-programs">
    <div class="section-hdr"><div class="section-title"><i class="fa-solid fa-clipboard-list"></i>Tous les programmes</div><button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="openProgramBuilder()"><i class="fa-solid fa-plus"></i>Créer un programme</button></div>
    <div class="cards-grid" id="programsGrid"></div>
    </div>
    <!-- LIBRARY -->
    <div class="view fade-in" id="view-library">
    <div class="section-hdr"><div class="section-title"><i class="fa-solid fa-book-medical"></i>Bibliothèque d'exercices</div><button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="openNewExercise()"><i class="fa-solid fa-plus"></i>Ajouter exercice</button></div>
    <div class="lib-grid" id="libraryGrid"></div>
    </div>
    <!-- SETTINGS -->
    <div class="view fade-in" id="view-settings">
    <div class="section-title" style="margin-bottom:20px"><i class="fa-solid fa-gear"></i>Paramètres du compte</div>
    <div style="max-width:560px">
    <div class="info-card">
    <div class="info-card-title"><i class="fa-solid fa-user"></i>Profil professionnel</div>
    <div class="form-grid" style="margin-top:12px">
    <div class="form-group"><label class="form-label">Prénom</label><input class="form-input" id="settFirstName"/></div>
    <div class="form-group"><label class="form-label">Nom</label><input class="form-input" id="settLastName"/></div>
    <div class="form-group full"><label class="form-label">Spécialité</label><input class="form-input" id="settSpeciality"/></div>
    <div class="form-group full"><label class="form-label">Cabinet</label><input class="form-input" id="settCabinet"/></div>
    <div class="form-group full"><button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="saveSettings()"><i class="fa-solid fa-floppy-disk"></i>Sauvegarder</button></div>
    </div>
    </div>
    </div>
    </div>
    </div>
    </main>
    </div>
    </div>
    <!-- MODALS -->
    <div class="modal-overlay" id="modalPatient">
    <div class="modal">
    <div class="modal-hdr"><div class="modal-hdr-title"><i class="fa-solid fa-user-plus" style="color:var(--accent)"></i><span id="modalPatientTitle">Nouveau patient</span></div><button class="modal-close" onclick="closeModal('modalPatient')"><i class="fa-solid fa-xmark"></i></button></div>
    <div class="modal-body">
    <div class="form-grid">
    <div class="form-group"><label class="form-label">Prénom <span>*</span></label><input class="form-input" id="pFirstName"/></div>
    <div class="form-group"><label class="form-label">Nom <span>*</span></label><input class="form-input" id="pLastName"/></div>
    <div class="form-group"><label class="form-label">Âge</label><input class="form-input" id="pAge" type="number"/></div>
    <div class="form-group"><label class="form-label">Genre</label><select class="form-select" id="pGender"><option value="H">Homme</option><option value="F">Femme</option><option value="N">Autre</option></select></div>
    <div class="form-group full"><label class="form-label">Pathologie <span>*</span></label><input class="form-input" id="pPathology"/></div>
    <div class="form-group"><label class="form-label">Téléphone</label><input class="form-input" id="pPhone"/></div>
    <div class="form-group"><label class="form-label">Email</label><input class="form-input" id="pEmail" type="email"/></div>
    <div class="form-group"><label class="form-label">Date de début</label><input class="form-input" id="pStartDate" type="date"/></div>
    <div class="form-group"><label class="form-label">Statut</label><select class="form-select" id="pStatus"><option value="active">Actif</option><option value="pause">En pause</option><option value="done">Terminé</option></select></div>
    <div class="form-group full"><label class="form-label">Notes initiales</label><textarea class="form-textarea" id="pNotes"></textarea><div class="form-group full">
    <label style="display:flex;gap:8px;align-items:flex-start;font-size:12px;color:var(--text2);line-height:1.4;text-transform:none;letter-spacing:0">
    <input type="checkbox" id="pConsent" style="margin-top:2px"/>
    <span>
    Le patient a donné son consentement éclairé pour le suivi numérique,
    le traitement de ses données de santé, l'accès à son programme en ligne
    et l'utilisation de la messagerie thérapeutique.
    </span>
    </label>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="rgpd-notice"><i class="fa-solid fa-shield-halved"></i>Ces données sont traitées conformément au RGPD.</div>
    </div>
    <div class="modal-footer"><button class="btn btn-secondary" onclick="closeModal('modalPatient')">Annuler</button><button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="savePatient()" id="btnSavePat"><i class="fa-solid fa-floppy-disk"></i>Enregistrer</button></div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="modal-overlay" id="modalProgram">
    <div class="modal modal-lg">
    <div class="modal-hdr"><div class="modal-hdr-title"><i class="fa-solid fa-clipboard-list" style="color:var(--accent)"></i><span id="modalProgTitle">Créer un programme</span></div><button class="modal-close" onclick="closeModal('modalProgram')"><i class="fa-solid fa-xmark"></i></button></div>
    <div class="modal-body">
    <div class="form-grid" style="margin-bottom:20px">
    <div class="form-group"><label class="form-label">Nom du programme <span>*</span></label><input class="form-input" id="progName"/></div>
    <div class="form-group"><label class="form-label">Patient</label><select class="form-select" id="progPatient"><option value="">— Sélectionner —</option></select></div>
    <div class="form-group"><label class="form-label">Phase</label><select class="form-select" id="progPhase"><option value="crise">Phase Crise</option><option value="renfo">Renforcement</option><option value="reprise">Reprise sportive</option><option value="prevention">Prévention</option><option value="custom">Personnalisée</option></select></div>
    <div class="form-group"><label class="form-label">Fréquence</label><input class="form-input" id="progFreq" placeholder="Ex: 2-3 séances/semaine"/></div>
    <div class="form-group full"><label class="form-label">Description / Consignes</label><textarea class="form-textarea" id="progDesc"></textarea></div>
    </div>
    <div class="ex-builder">
    <div class="ex-builder-hdr"><div class="ex-builder-hdr-title"><i class="fa-solid fa-dumbbell" style="color:var(--accent)"></i>Exercices</div>
    <div style="display:flex;gap:8px"><button class="btn btn-secondary btn-sm" onclick="addFromLibrary()"><i class="fa-solid fa-book-medical"></i> Bibliothèque</button><button class="btn btn-primary btn-sm" onclick="addExercise()"><i class="fa-solid fa-plus"></i> Ajouter</button></div>
    </div>
    <div id="exercisesContainer"><div style="text-align:center;padding:24px;color:var(--text3);font-size:13px">Ajoutez des exercices via les boutons ci-dessus.</div></div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="modal-footer"><button class="btn btn-secondary" onclick="closeModal('modalProgram')">Annuler</button><button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="saveProgram()" id="btnSaveProgBtn"><i class="fa-solid fa-floppy-disk"></i>Enregistrer programme</button></div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="modal-overlay" id="modalExercise">
    <div class="modal">
    <div class="modal-hdr"><div class="modal-hdr-title"><i class="fa-solid fa-dumbbell" style="color:var(--accent)"></i><span id="modalExTitle">Nouvel exercice</span></div><button class="modal-close" onclick="closeModal('modalExercise')"><i class="fa-solid fa-xmark"></i></button></div>
    <div class="modal-body">
    <div class="form-grid">
    <div class="form-group full"><label class="form-label">Nom <span>*</span></label><input class="form-input" id="exName"/></div>
    <div class="form-group full"><label class="form-label">Focus / Cue</label><textarea class="form-textarea" id="exFocus" style="min-height:60px"></textarea></div>
    <div class="form-group"><label class="form-label">Séries</label><input class="form-input" id="exSeries"/></div>
    <div class="form-group"><label class="form-label">Reps / Durée</label><input class="form-input" id="exReps" placeholder="15 reps ou 45s"/></div>
    <div class="form-group"><label class="form-label">Récupération</label><input class="form-input" id="exRest" placeholder="60-90s"/></div>
    <div class="form-group"><label class="form-label">Tempo</label><input class="form-input" id="exTempo" placeholder="3-1-3"/></div>
    <div class="form-group"><label class="form-label">EVA cible</label><input class="form-input" id="exEVA" placeholder="≤ 4/10"/></div>
    <div class="form-group"><label class="form-label">Catégorie</label><select class="form-select" id="exCategory"><option value="quadri">Quadriceps</option><option value="fessiers">Fessiers</option><option value="ischio">Ischio</option><option value="gainage">Gainage</option><option value="cardio">Cardio</option><option value="iso">Isométrique</option><option value="autre">Autre</option></select></div>
    <div class="form-group full"><label class="form-label">Lien vidéo YouTube</label><input class="form-input" id="exVideo"/></div>
    <div class="form-group full"><label class="form-label">Régression</label><input class="form-input" id="exRegress"/></div>
    <div class="form-group full"><label class="form-label">Progression</label><input class="form-input" id="exProgress"/></div>
    <div class="form-group full"><label class="form-label">Matériel alternatif</label><input class="form-input" id="exAlt"/></div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="modal-footer"><button class="btn btn-secondary" onclick="closeModal('modalExercise')">Annuler</button><button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="saveExercise()"><i class="fa-solid fa-floppy-disk"></i>Sauvegarder</button></div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="modal-overlay" id="modalLibPicker">
    <div class="modal">
    <div class="modal-hdr"><div class="modal-hdr-title"><i class="fa-solid fa-book-medical" style="color:var(--accent)"></i>Choisir un exercice</div><button class="modal-close" onclick="closeModal('modalLibPicker')"><i class="fa-solid fa-xmark"></i></button></div>
    <div class="modal-body">
    <div class="search-wrap" style="max-width:100%;margin-bottom:14px"><i class="fa-solid fa-magnifying-glass"></i><input class="search-input" id="libPickerSearch" placeholder="Rechercher..." oninput="filterLibPicker()"/></div>
    <div class="lib-grid" id="libPickerGrid" style="grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(200px,1fr))"></div>
    </div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <script>
    // ============================================================
    // CONFIGURATION SUPABASE — REMPLACE PAR TES VRAIES VALEURS
    // ============================================================
    const SUPABASE_URL = 'https://sdfaoloncvwrximuxcqh.supabase.co';
    const SUPABASE_KEY = 'eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJzdXBhYmFzZSIsInJlZiI6InNkZmFvbG9uY3Z3cnhpbXV4Y3FoIiwicm9sZSI6ImFub24iLCJpYXQiOjE3ODE2MjQzMjIsImV4cCI6MjA5NzIwMDMyMn0.H3I7trLzEXNseMTXn8-r8CBAORMgeKf_-xiMTU0txzU';
    const db = window.supabase.createClient(SUPABASE_URL, SUPABASE_KEY);
    console.log('Supabase initialisé :', SUPABASE_URL);
    db.auth.onAuthStateChange((event, session) => {
    console.log('=== AUTH EVENT ===', event);
    console.log('Session complète :', session);
    if(session) console.log('User ID :', session.user.id);
    });
    // Intercepte les erreurs globales
    window.addEventListener('unhandledrejection', e => {
    console.error('Erreur non gérée :', e.reason);
    });
    // ====== FIN DEBUG ======
    // ===== STATE =====
    let currentPractitioner = null;
    let patients = [];
    let programs = [];
    let library = [];
    let messages = [];
    let currentPatientId = null;
    let editingPatientId = null;
    let editingProgId = null;
    let editingExId = null;
    let exercisesInBuilder = [];
    let realtimeChannels = [];
    // ===== AUTH (simplifié : email = identifiant, table practitioners) =====
    async function isEmailAuthorized(email){
    const { data, error } = await db
    .from('authorized_practitioners')
    .select('email, used')
    .eq('email', email)
    .maybeSingle();
    if(error){
    throw error;
    }
    return !!data;
    }
    async function doLogin(){
    const email = document.getElementById('loginEmail').value.trim().toLowerCase();
    const password = document.getElementById('loginPwd').value;
    const errEl = document.getElementById('loginError');
    const btn = document.getElementById('loginBtnEl');
    errEl.style.display = 'none';
    errEl.textContent = '';
    if(!email || password.length < 8){
    errEl.textContent = 'Email valide et mot de passe de 8 caractères minimum requis.';
    errEl.style.display = 'block';
    return;
    }
    btn.disabled = true;
    const oldHtml = btn.innerHTML;
    btn.innerHTML = '<span class="loading-spinner"></span> Connexion...';
    try {
    let authData = null;
    const loginResult = await db.auth.signInWithPassword({
    email,
    password
    });
    if(loginResult.error){
    const msg = loginResult.error.message || '';
    if(msg.includes('Invalid login credentials')){
    const authorized = await isEmailAuthorized(email);
    if(!authorized){
    throw new Error("Cet email n'est pas autorisé à créer un compte kiné.");
    }
    const signupResult = await db.auth.signUp({
    email,
    password
    });
    if(signupResult.error){
    throw signupResult.error;
    }
    authData = signupResult.data;
    } else {
    throw loginResult.error;
    } else {
    authData = loginResult.data;
    }
    }
    const user = authData.user;
    if(!user){
    throw new Error('Utilisateur Supabase introuvable après authentification.');
    }
    let { data: practitioner, error: profileError } = await db
    .from('practitioners')
    .select('*')
    .eq('id', user.id)
    .maybeSingle();
    if(profileError){
    throw profileError;
    }
    if(!practitioner){
    const { data: created, error: createError } = await db
    .from('practitioners')
    .insert({
    id: user.id,
    email: user.email,
    first_name: '',
    last_name: '',
    speciality: '',
    cabinet: ''
    })
    .select()
    .single();
    if(createError){
    throw createError;
    }
    practitioner = created;
    }
    currentPractitioner = practitioner;
    showBackoffice();
    await loadAllData();
    setupRealtimeSubscriptions();
    } catch(e) {
    console.error('Erreur login:', e);
    errEl.textContent = 'Erreur : ' + e.message;
    errEl.style.display = 'block';
    } finally {
    btn.disabled = false;
    btn.innerHTML = oldHtml;
    }
    }
    document.getElementById('loginPwd').addEventListener('keydown',e=>{if(e.key==='Enter')doLogin()});
    async function doLogout(){
    realtimeChannels.forEach(ch => db.removeChannel(ch));
    realtimeChannels = [];
    await db.auth.signOut();
    currentPractitioner = null;
    patients = [];
    programs = [];
    library = [];
    showLogin();
    }
    // Auto-login si déjà connecté
    async function tryAutoLogin(){
    try {
    const { data: { session }, error } = await db.auth.getSession();
    if(error){
    throw error;
    }
    if(!session || !session.user){
    showLogin();
    return;
    }
    const user = session.user;
    const { data: practitioner, error: profileError } = await db
    .from('practitioners')
    .select('*')
    .eq('id', user.id)
    .maybeSingle();
    if(profileError){
    throw profileError;
    }
    if(!practitioner){
    showLogin();
    return;
    }
    currentPractitioner = practitioner;
    showBackoffice();
    await loadAllData();
    setupRealtimeSubscriptions();
    } catch(e) {
    console.error('Erreur auto-login:', e);
    showLogin();
    }
    }
    // ===== LOAD DATA =====
    async function loadAllData(){
    const pid = currentPractitioner.id;
    const [{data:pats},{data:progs},{data:lib}] = await Promise.all([
    db.from('patients').select('*').eq('practitioner_id',pid).order('created_at',{ascending:false}),
    db.from('programs').select('*, patients!inner(practitioner_id)').eq('patients.practitioner_id',pid),
    db.from('exercises_library').select('*').eq('practitioner_id',pid).order('created_at',{ascending:false})
    ]);
    patients = pats||[];
    programs = (progs||[]).map(p=>{ delete p.patients; return p; });
    library = lib||[];
    renderPatients();
    renderPrograms();
    renderLibrary();
    refreshDashboard();
    }
    // ===== REALTIME : la magie de l'interconnexion =====
    function setupRealtimeSubscriptions(){
    // Écoute les nouvelles séances (patients qui valident leur séance)
    const sessionsChannel = db.channel('sessions-changes')
    .on('postgres_changes', {event:'INSERT', schema:'public', table:'sessions'}, payload=>{
    handleNewSession(payload.new);
    }).subscribe();
    // Écoute les nouveaux messages patients
    const messagesChannel = db.channel('messages-changes')
    .on('postgres_changes', {event:'INSERT', schema:'public', table:'messages'}, payload=>{
    handleNewMessage(payload.new);
    }).subscribe();
    // Écoute les mises à jour de patients (ex: dernière activité)
    const patientsChannel = db.channel('patients-changes')
    .on('postgres_changes', {event:'*', schema:'public', table:'patients'}, payload=>{
    loadAllData(); // refresh simple et fiable
    }).subscribe();
    realtimeChannels = [sessionsChannel, messagesChannel, patientsChannel];
    }
    function handleNewSession(session){
    const patient = patients.find(p=>p.id===session.patient_id);
    if(!patient) return; // pas un de nos patients
    showToast(`🔔 ${patient.first_name} ${patient.last_name} vient de valider une séance !`,'green');
    addActivityRow(patient, 'Séance validée', session.created_at);
    if(currentPatientId===session.patient_id) renderSuivi(currentPatientId);
    refreshDashboard();
    }
    function handleNewMessage(msg){
    if(msg.sender!=='patient') return;
    const patient = patients.find(p=>p.id===msg.patient_id);
    if(!patient) return;
    showToast(`💬 Nouveau message de ${patient.first_name} ${patient.last_name}`,'blue');
    addActivityRow(patient, 'Nouveau message', msg.created_at);
    if(currentPatientId===msg.patient_id) renderMessages(currentPatientId);
    }
    function addActivityRow(patient, action, date){
    const body=document.getElementById('activityBody');
    if(body.children[0]?.children[0]?.colSpan===3 && body.children.length===1 && body.textContent.includes('Aucune')) body.innerHTML='';
    const row=document.createElement('tr');
    row.innerHTML=`<td><div class="patient-cell"><div class="patient-avatar" style="background:${getColor(patient.id)}">${getInitials(patient)}</div><span style="font-weight:600;font-size:13px">${patient.first_name} ${patient.last_name}</span></div></td><td><span class="badge badge-blue">${action}</span></td><td style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text3)">À l'instant</td>`;
    body.prepend(row);
    while(body.children.length>8) body.removeChild(body.lastChild);
    }
    // ===== PATIENTS CRUD =====
    function genToken(){return crypto.randomUUID();}
    const avatarColors=['#3b82f6','#10b981','#8b5cf6','#f59e0b','#ef4444','#06b6d4','#ec4899'];
    function getColor(id){return avatarColors[parseInt((id||'0').replace(/-/g,'').slice(-2),16)%avatarColors.length]||avatarColors[0]}
    function getInitials(p){return((p.first_name||'?')[0]+(p.last_name||'?')[0]).toUpperCase()}
    function openNewPatient(){
    editingPatientId=null;
    document.getElementById('modalPatientTitle').textContent='Nouveau patient';
    ['pFirstName','pLastName','pAge','pPhone','pEmail','pNotes','pPathology'].forEach(id=>document.getElementById(id).value='');
    document.getElementById('pStatus').value='active';
    document.getElementById('pStartDate').value=new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10);
    document.getElementById('pConsent').checked = false;
    openModal('modalPatient');
    }
    function editCurrentPatient(){
    const p=patients.find(x=>x.id===currentPatientId);if(!p)return;
    editingPatientId=p.id;
    document.getElementById('modalPatientTitle').textContent='Modifier';
    document.getElementById('pFirstName').value=p.first_name||'';
    document.getElementById('pLastName').value=p.last_name||'';
    document.getElementById('pAge').value=p.age||'';
    document.getElementById('pPathology').value=p.pathology||'';
    document.getElementById('pPhone').value=p.phone||'';
    document.getElementById('pEmail').value=p.email||'';
    document.getElementById('pStatus').value=p.status||'active';
    document.getElementById('pStartDate').value=p.start_date||'';
    document.getElementById('pNotes').value=p.notes||'';
    openModal('modalPatient');
    }
    async function savePatient(){
    const fn=document.getElementById('pFirstName').value.trim();
    const ln=document.getElementById('pLastName').value.trim();
    const path=document.getElementById('pPathology').value.trim();
    const consentChecked = document.getElementById('pConsent').checked;
    if(!fn||!ln){showToast('Prénom et nom requis','red');return;}
    if(!editingPatientId && !consentChecked){
    showToast('Consentement patient requis', 'red');
    return;
    }
    const btn=document.getElementById('btnSavePat');
    btn.disabled=true; const origHtml=btn.innerHTML; btn.innerHTML='<span class="loading-spinner" style="border-top-color:#fff"></span> Enregistrement...';
    const payload={
    first_name: fn,
    last_name: ln,
    age: document.getElementById('pAge').value ? parseInt(document.getElementById('pAge').value, 10) : null,
    pathology: path,
    phone: document.getElementById('pPhone').value.trim(),
    email: document.getElementById('pEmail').value.trim().toLowerCase(),
    status: document.getElementById('pStatus').value,
    start_date: document.getElementById('pStartDate').value || null,
    notes: document.getElementById('pNotes').value,
    consent_given: consentChecked,
    consent_given_at: consentChecked ? new Date().toISOString() : null,
    consent_text_version: consentChecked ? 'v1-2026-06' : null,
    updated_at: new Date().toISOString()
    };
    try{
    if(editingPatientId){
    const {error} = await db.from('patients').update(payload)
    .eq('id', editingPatientId)
    .eq('practitioner_id', currentPractitioner.id);
    if(error) throw error;
    } else {
    payload.practitioner_id = currentPractitioner.id;
    payload.token = crypto.randomUUID();
    const {error} = await db.from('patients').insert(payload);
    if(error) throw error;
    }
    await loadAllData();
    closeModal('modalPatient'); showToast('Sauvegardé !');
    if(editingPatientId) showPatientDetail(editingPatientId);
    } catch(e){ showToast('Erreur : '+e.message,'red'); }
    finally{ btn.disabled=false; btn.innerHTML=origHtml; }
    }
    async function deleteCurrentPatient(){
    if(!confirm('Supprimer ce patient et toutes ses données ? Action irréversible (RGPD).'))return;
    const {error} = await db.from('patients').delete()
    .eq('id', currentPatientId)
    .eq('practitioner_id', currentPractitioner.id);
    if(error){ showToast('Erreur : '+error.message,'red'); return; }
    showToast('Supprimé.'); await loadAllData(); showView('patients');
    }
    function filterPatients(){ renderPatients(document.getElementById('patientSearch').value.toLowerCase()); }
    function renderPatients(q=''){
    const body=document.getElementById('patientsBody');
    const filtered=patients.filter(p=>((p.first_name||'')+' '+(p.last_name||'')+' '+(p.pathology||'')).toLowerCase().includes(q));
    document.getElementById('patientsBadge').textContent=patients.length;
    if(!filtered.length){body.innerHTML=`<tr><td colspan="6" style="text-align:center;padding:32px;color:var(--text3)">Aucun patient. Cliquez sur "Nouveau patient".</td></tr>`;return;}
    const statusLabel=s=>({active:'Actif',pause:'En pause',done:'Terminé'}[s]||s);
    const statusClass=s=>({active:'badge-green',pause:'badge-orange',done:'badge-gray'}[s]||'badge-gray');
    const patProgs=id=>programs.filter(p=>p.patient_id===id);
    body.innerHTML=filtered.map(p=>`
    <tr style="cursor:pointer" onclick="showPatientDetail('${p.id}')">
    <td><div class="patient-cell"><div class="patient-avatar" style="background:${getColor(p.id)}">${getInitials(p)}</div><div><div class="patient-name">${p.first_name} ${p.last_name}</div><div class="patient-patho">${p.pathology||'—'}</div></div></div></td>
    <td>${p.age||'—'}</td>
    <td>${patProgs(p.id).length?patProgs(p.id).map(pr=>`<span class="badge badge-blue">${pr.name}</span>`).join(' '):'<span class="badge badge-gray">—</span>'}</td>
    <td><span class="badge ${statusClass(p.status)}">${statusLabel(p.status)}</span></td>
    <td style="font-size:11px">${new Date(p.created_at).toLocaleDateString('fr-FR')}</td>
    <td><div style="display:flex;gap:6px">
    <button class="btn btn-secondary btn-sm btn-icon-only" onclick="event.stopPropagation();currentPatientId='${p.id}';editCurrentPatient()"><i class="fa-solid fa-pen"></i></button>
    <button class="btn btn-danger btn-sm btn-icon-only" onclick="event.stopPropagation();currentPatientId='${p.id}';deleteCurrentPatient()"><i class="fa-solid fa-trash"></i></button>
    </div></td>
    </tr>`).join('');
    }
    async function showPatientDetail(id){
    currentPatientId=id;
    const p=patients.find(x=>x.id===id);if(!p)return;
    showView('patient-detail');
    document.getElementById('topbarTitle').textContent=p.first_name+' '+p.last_name;
    const av=document.getElementById('detailAvatar');
    av.textContent=getInitials(p);av.style.background=getColor(p.id);
    document.getElementById('detailName').textContent=p.first_name+' '+p.last_name;
    document.getElementById('detailPatho').textContent=p.pathology||'—';
    const statusLabel=s=>({active:'Actif',pause:'En pause',done:'Terminé'}[s]||s);
    const statusClass=s=>({active:'badge-green',pause:'badge-orange',done:'badge-gray'}[s]||'badge-gray');
    document.getElementById('detailMeta').innerHTML=`<span class="badge ${statusClass(p.status)}">${statusLabel(p.status)}</span>`;
    document.getElementById('detailInfoRows').innerHTML=`
    <div class="info-row"><span class="info-row-label">Âge</span><span class="info-row-val">${p.age||'—'}</span></div>
    <div class="info-row"><span class="info-row-label">Tel.</span><span class="info-row-val">${p.phone||'—'}</span></div>
    <div class="info-row"><span class="info-row-label">Email</span><span class="info-row-val">${p.email||'—'}</span></div>
    <div class="info-row"><span class="info-row-label">Début</span><span class="info-row-val">${p.start_date||'—'}</span></div>`;
    const shareUrl=`${location.origin}${location.pathname.replace('index.html','')}patient.html?token=${p.token}`;
    document.getElementById('shareBox').innerHTML=`
    <div class="share-box">
    <div style="font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:#1e40af;margin-bottom:6px">Lien unique patient</div>
    <div class="share-link-row"><div class="share-link" id="shareUrlText">${shareUrl}</div></div>
    <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;margin-top:10px"><button class="btn btn-primary btn-sm" onclick="copyLink('${shareUrl}')"><i class="fa-solid fa-copy"></i> Copier le lien</button></div>
    <div class="rgpd-notice" style="margin-top:10px"><i class="fa-solid fa-shield-halved"></i>Le lien ne contient aucune donnée nominative</div>
    </div>`;
    document.getElementById('privateNotes').value=p.private_notes||'';
    renderPatientPrograms(id);
    await renderMessages(id);
    await renderSuivi(id);
    switchTab(0,document.querySelectorAll('.tab')[0]);
    }
    async function saveNotes(){
    const val=document.getElementById('privateNotes').value;
    await db.from('patients').update({
    private_notes: val,
    updated_at: new Date().toISOString()
    })
    .eq('id', currentPatientId)
    .eq('practitioner_id', currentPractitioner.id);
    const p=patients.find(x=>x.id===currentPatientId); if(p)p.private_notes=val;
    }
    function copyLink(url){navigator.clipboard.writeText(url).then(()=>showToast('Lien copié !','green'))}
    // ===== PROGRAMS =====
    function openProgramBuilder(progId=null){
    editingProgId=progId; exercisesInBuilder=[];
    if(progId){
    const prog=programs.find(x=>x.id===progId);
    if(prog){
    document.getElementById('progName').value=prog.name||'';
    document.getElementById('progPhase').value=prog.phase||'crise';
    document.getElementById('progFreq').value=prog.frequency||'';
    document.getElementById('progDesc').value=prog.description||'';
    document.getElementById('progPatient').value=prog.patient_id||'';
    exercisesInBuilder=JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(prog.exercises||[]));
    }
    } else {
    document.getElementById('progName').value='';document.getElementById('progPhase').value='crise';
    document.getElementById('progFreq').value='';document.getElementById('progDesc').value='';
    document.getElementById('progPatient').value=currentPatientId||'';
    }
    const sel=document.getElementById('progPatient');
    sel.innerHTML='<option value="">— Sélectionner —</option>'+patients.map(p=>`<option value="${p.id}">${p.first_name} ${p.last_name}</option>`).join('');
    if(currentPatientId)sel.value=currentPatientId;
    renderExercisesBuilder();
    openModal('modalProgram');
    }
    function addExercise(){
    exercisesInBuilder.push({id:'tmp'+Date.now(),name:'Nouvel exercice',series:'4',reps:'15',rest:'60-90s',tempo:'',focus:'',video:'',regression:'',progression:'',alt:'',evaTarget:'≤ 4/10'});
    renderExercisesBuilder();
    }
    function removeExercise(idx){exercisesInBuilder.splice(idx,1);renderExercisesBuilder()}
    function renderExercisesBuilder(){
    const c=document.getElementById('exercisesContainer');
    if(!exercisesInBuilder.length){c.innerHTML=`<div style="text-align:center;padding:24px;color:var(--text3);font-size:13px">Ajoutez des exercices via les boutons ci-dessus.</div>`;return;}
    c.innerHTML=exercisesInBuilder.map((ex,i)=>`
    <div class="ex-item${ex._open?' open':''}">
    <div class="ex-item-hdr" onclick="toggleExItem(${i})">
    <i class="fa-solid fa-grip-vertical ex-drag"></i><div class="ex-num">${i+1}</div>
    <div style="flex:1"><div class="ex-item-name">${ex.name||'Exercice '+(i+1)}</div><div class="ex-item-quick">${ex.series||'?'}×${ex.reps||'?'} · ${ex.rest||'?'}</div></div>
    <button class="btn btn-danger btn-sm btn-icon-only" onclick="event.stopPropagation();removeExercise(${i})"><i class="fa-solid fa-trash"></i></button>
    <i class="fa-solid fa-chevron-down ex-chevron"></i>
    </div>
    <div class="ex-item-body">
    <div class="form-grid" style="margin-bottom:12px">
    <div class="form-group full"><label class="form-label">Nom</label><input class="form-input" value="${ex.name||''}" oninput="updateEx(${i},'name',this.value)"/></div>
    <div class="form-group full"><label class="form-label">Focus / Cue</label><textarea class="form-textarea" style="min-height:50px" oninput="updateEx(${i},'focus',this.value)">${ex.focus||''}</textarea></div>
    </div>
    <div class="dosage-row">
    <div class="dosage-mini"><label>Séries</label><input class="form-input" value="${ex.series||''}" oninput="updateEx(${i},'series',this.value)"/></div>
    <div class="dosage-mini"><label>Reps / Durée</label><input class="form-input" value="${ex.reps||''}" oninput="updateEx(${i},'reps',this.value)"/></div>
    <div class="dosage-mini"><label>Récup.</label><input class="form-input" value="${ex.rest||''}" oninput="updateEx(${i},'rest',this.value)"/></div>
    </div>
    <div class="dosage-row">
    <div class="dosage-mini"><label>Tempo</label><input class="form-input" value="${ex.tempo||''}" oninput="updateEx(${i},'tempo',this.value)"/></div>
    <div class="dosage-mini"><label>EVA cible</label><input class="form-input" value="${ex.evaTarget||''}" oninput="updateEx(${i},'evaTarget',this.value)"/></div>
    <div class="dosage-mini"><label>Vidéo (URL)</label><input class="form-input" value="${ex.video||''}" oninput="updateEx(${i},'video',this.value)"/></div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-grid" style="margin-top:8px">
    <div class="form-group"><label class="form-label">Régression</label><input class="form-input" value="${ex.regression||''}" oninput="updateEx(${i},'regression',this.value)"/></div>
    <div class="form-group"><label class="form-label">Progression</label><input class="form-input" value="${ex.progression||''}" oninput="updateEx(${i},'progression',this.value)"/></div>
    <div class="form-group full"><label class="form-label">Matériel alternatif</label><input class="form-input" value="${ex.alt||''}" oninput="updateEx(${i},'alt',this.value)"/></div>
    </div>
    </div>
    </div>`).join('');
    }
    function toggleExItem(i){exercisesInBuilder[i]._open=!exercisesInBuilder[i]._open;renderExercisesBuilder()}
    function updateEx(i,key,val){exercisesInBuilder[i][key]=val;}
    View remainder of file in raw view
